'RedCrewMateHand2 Colors

}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x0
}%11111111_01001010_01010100_01100010,{   'index=0x1
}%11111111_01101101_01110101_10001101,{   'index=0x2

}%11111111_00111011_00010111_00100101,{   'index=0x8
}%11111111_10110100_00100000_00101010   'index=0x9
